summary: 任务‘暴露’广泛:三项独立来源汇聚——Eloundou 等估约 80% 劳动力≥10% 任务、约 19% 工人≥50% 任务受 LLM 影响;高盛估相当于 3 亿全职岗位暴露、但仅约 7% 就业被替代、63% 被互补;OECD 估最高风险职业约占 27%。三者均强调‘暴露≠自动化/净失业’。故任务层替代的是‘广度上界’,而非已实现的岗位消灭。

evidence.title: Eloundou et al. GPTs are GPTs
evidence.quote: around 80% of the U.S. workforce could have at least 10% of their work tasks

evidence.title: Eloundou et al. GPTs are GPTs
evidence.quote: approximately 19% of workers may see at least 50% of

evidence.title: Goldman Sachs (Briggs & Kodnani)
evidence.quote: 7% of current US employment being substituted by AI

evidence.title: OECD Employment Outlook 2023
evidence.quote: occupations at the highest risk of automation account for 27% of employment

evidence.title: OECD Employment Outlook 2023
evidence.quote: does not necessarily imply short-term losses in employment

open_questions: 暴露阈值差异大(19%~66%),口径不统一,难直接比较
